gene_region.label: PCSK9 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical PCSK9 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: PCSK9 encodes a secreted proprotein convertase that binds LDL receptor and promotes receptor degradation, thereby tuning hepatic LDL uptake and circulating LDL cholesterol.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local PCSK9 bundle is lipid and pharmacogenetic-mechanism oriented. Loss-of-function and gain-of-function alleles can have different LDL-C and cardiovascular-risk implications.
variant_effect_overview: PCSK9 loss-of-function alleles tend to lower LDL-C through increased LDL receptor availability.
Rare gain-of-function variants can support familial hypercholesterolemia context when externally classified.
condition_research_overview: LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: PCSK9 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for PCSK9.
Because PCSK9 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use PCSK9 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation.
LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000169174: PCSK9 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: PCSK9 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a PCSK9 LDL-receptor-trafficking thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to LDL-C set point, hepatic LDL receptor recycling/degradation, cardiovascular lipid traits, familial hypercholesterolemia review, or PCSK9 inhibitor target biology.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs11591147 (PCSK9 R46L) is curated as a PCSK9 marker for LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology, Familial hypercholesterolemia review context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology
research_context: Use this marker as a PCSK9 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs11591147 (PCSK9 R46L) with PCSK9 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
